title: Bring back international rail to Ashford!
h1: Bring International Rail Back to Ashford!
meta_description:
Bring back international rail to Ashford!
Helena Dollimore MP - Hastings, Rye and the villages
text_excerpt: --> Bring back international rail to Ashford! top of page Sign up to my newsletter! About Helena News Campaigns £21.5 million for Hastings Ashford International petition Empty Shops Petition Bring back our Emergency Vets! GP Survey Bus Survey Under 16's Social Media Survey Faster Trains from Hastings Playground Petition Harrow Lane Community Centre Sir Richard Branson: reopen Ashford! #BinTheBeads Volunteer Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Donate Bring International Rail Back to Ashford! Reopening international travel at Ashford would open up our area to opportunity. A new report has shown that resuming international rail services from Ashford could boost our local economy in the South East by over £2.7 billion! ​ The Labour government has pledged its support to the reopening of Ashford International, and if Eurostar won’t step up and resume the service, we should enable another train operator to take it over. We have until 18th September to make the case to the Office for Rail and Road on whether to let other train operators run cross-channel services which could stop at Ashford. Sign my petition to tell them they should say yes to bringing back international rail to Ashford! Keep me updated on Helena's campaigns I understand I can manage my references or unsubscribe at any time by replying to an email or contacting hello@helenadollimore.com . We may use the information you provide, such as name and postcode, to match the data provided to your electoral register record held on our electoral database, which could inform future communications you receive from us. We may use your answers to help us campaign better. If signing up for an event, we may still use the details provided to contact you specifically about that event. For more information, please see our private policy . Submit Thanks for signing. Promoted by Helena Dollimore on behalf of Helena Dollimore at 84 Bohemia Road, St Leonards on Sea, TN37 6RN Privacy Policy bottom of page
